name: ntp_max_counter
description: Maximum value of 32-bit unsigned NTP seconds counter (2^32 - 1)

name: ntp_wraparound_year
description: Calendar year of NTP 32-bit overflow: February 6, 2036

name: ntp_wraparound_seconds_from_epoch
description: Seconds from Jan 1 1900 at which NTP 32-bit counter wraps

name: unix_max_counter
description: Maximum value of 32-bit signed UNIX integer (2^31 - 1)

name: unix_wraparound_year
description: Calendar year of UNIX 32-bit signed overflow: January 19, 2038

name: unix_wraparound_seconds_from_epoch
description: Seconds from Jan 1 1970 at which UNIX 32-bit counter hits max

name: unix_post_overflow_interpreted_year
description: Year that post-overflow UNIX counter is misinterpreted as: Dec 13, 1901

name: ntp_post_overflow_interpreted_year
description: Year that post-overflow NTP counter is misinterpreted as: Jan 1, 1900

name: unix_64bit_max_years
description: Duration before 64-bit UNIX counter overflows (~292 billion years)

name: patch_rate_per_year
description: Annual fraction of legacy/IoT devices upgraded from 32-bit to 64-bit

name: initial_legacy_fraction
description: Fraction of deployed embedded/IoT systems still using 32-bit time at start

name: seconds_per_year
description: Approximate seconds per Julian year (365.25 days)

name: time_step_days
description: Simulation time step in days (monthly resolution)
